response.justification: Bogdan brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience, with recent production work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure. He satisfies the rare AI-agent development requirement directly through MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling in his current role, and his deep testing craftsmanship (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright, and Kotlin experience, though his breadth suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React production work
Direct AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, authored test libraries, ran testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being the primary backend framework
Vitest and Playwright not mentioned; testing depth is in other ecosystems (Jest-adjacent, Selenium, DLang)
No Kotlin, and Java exposure appears limited and dated for the secondary stack

key_factors.factor: Depth and length of full-stack TypeScript/Node/React experience
Hands-on AI agent development in current role
Missing Nest.js and Vitest/Playwright from the primary stack
